title: Indulgent Japanese Cheese Stir-fry
description: A bitter, dense dish featuring fromage frais in a smoke-infused sauce that's perfect for pescatarian evenings.

ingredients.name: Shiso Leaves (Perilla Leaf)
ingredients.notes: For added bitterness and depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Japanese Tamari Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use tamari as soy sauce is not suitable for pescatarian dishes

ingredients.name: Peanut Oil or Light Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking and flavoring the dish

ingredients.name: Japanese Mirin Rice Wine Glutinous Rice Vinegar or Plum Vinegar
Sesame Seeds (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add a crunchy texture and nutty flavor

instructions: Combine fromage frais, shiso leaves, tamari, mirin, sesame seeds (if using), green onions, and peanut oil in a mixing bowl.
Stir the mixture until evenly combined and the shiso leaves are fully incorporated. Let it marinate for at least 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Heat the peanut oil or light olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the marinated fromage frais mix and stir-fry until heated through, about 3-4 minutes. Add green onions and continue to stir for another minute.
Serve hot as an appetizer or side dish with rice.
